title: Traest Kre'fey

{{Quote|We're going to smash the Vong! We're going to smash them every day! We're going to smash them until there are no more Yuuzhan Vong!|Traest Kre'fey|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way">''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''</ref>}}
'''Traest Kre'fey''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] who led forces at a number of engagements during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] and the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
===Early life===
{{Quote|Believe it or not, Master Durron, I can sympathize with you to a certain extent. Like yourself, I've found it more productive to fight the Yuuzhan Vong in my own way, without bureaucratic shackles. It has made me quite as unpopular as you are.|Traest Kre'fey|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''</ref>}}
Traest Kre'fey was a grandson of [[Laryn Kre'fey]], and as the [[Kre'fey family|Kre'fey's]] lost much of their power due to his grandfather's [[First Battle of Borleias|failure]] at [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]], Kre'fey was sent to a smaller satellite school of the [[Bothan Martial Academy]]. There, he was instructed under a rather unorthodox Bothan teacher and developed unusual views of Bothan society.<ref name="Onslaught" /> In particular, he held the view that Bothan society at its current form was less than perfect, and that they needed to change to better exist within [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Because of the string of resignations in the Bothan military over the [[Caamas Document Crisis]], Kre'fey was quickly advanced to the rank of [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]].

While he was a first cousin of [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Borsk Fey'lya]], he disagreed with his kinsman about the threat of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], and their relationship was rather combative, though for Bothans, that was rather typical. He recognized the threat of the Yuuzhan Vong early on and prior to the [[Battle of Ithor]], threatened to take the military into the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] or place [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] into power via a military coup d'état if Fey'lya would not act. Unlike other admirals, Kre'fey actively sought the help of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. When [[Kyp Durron]] came asking for help in destroying a [[gravitic superweapon]] the Yuuzhan Vong were growing in the remains of [[Sernpidal/Legends|Sernpidal]], he provided his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the ''[[Ralroost]]'' to help.

===Ar'krai===
{{Quote|The enemy shall become dust or we shall.|Traest Kre'fey|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way" />}}
Kre'fey was one of the commanders at the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Fall]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], commanding [[Fleet Group One]]. He performed conservative actions during the battle, and most of his ships abandoned his orders and defected over to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]. After the battle, he returned to [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] for the official period of mourning for Borsk Fey'lya, who was killed during the assault. While he was there, the [[Combined Bothan Clans|Bothan Council]] officially declared a state of [[ar'krai]]. Kre'fey took to the declaration of total war wholeheartedly, making some of the Jedi under his command suspicious of his intentions. However, the [[High Council (Galactic Alliance)|High Council]] decided that if Kre'fey tried any "illegal" actions, the [[Force-meld|Force meld]] would prevent the soldiers under his command from doing so. With several squadrons of Jedi under his command, Kre'fey took the fight to the Yuuzhan Vong during the interlude between the election of [[Cal Omas]] and the [[Battle of Ebaq]] 9, raiding Yuuzhan Vong colonies and attacking the [[Peace Brigade]] on [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]]. On the ''Ralroost''{{'s}} bulkhead, he inscribed two questions: "''What can I do to hurt the Vong today?''" and "''How can I help my own side grow stronger?''", to remind his crew to try to answer the threat of the Yuuzhan Vong.<ref name="Ylesia">''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]''</ref>

From his flagship ''[[Ralroost]]'', Kre'fey participated at the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar|final battle]] of the war in the space around [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], and was present at the formal surrender of the Yuuzhan Vong. Following the surrender of the Yuuzhan Vong, Kre'fey became the [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]] and earned the title "Liberator of Coruscant," becoming a hero to much of the galaxy. However, as the Bothans refused to cease the state of [[ar'krai]], Kre'fey was forced to resign shortly thereafter.

===Second Galactic Civil War===
After the war, he was hailed as a liberator of Coruscant and went after the abdication of his position as commander in chief.<ref name="cswe">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> Kre'fey returned to Bothawui, though by [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], as conflict broke out between [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and the Alliance, the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] soon became involved. Before long, [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], now head of the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]], began rounding up, interning and executing Bothans on Coruscant due to the support they demonstrated towards Corellia and the actions of the [[True Victory Party]].<ref name="tempest">''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''</ref> When Bothawui joined Corellia militarily, Kre'fey became active in its ranks as an admiral, commanding an element of the Bothan fleet at the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kashyyyk]] under the command of Admiral [[Babo]]. During the battle, the Bothan forces had engaged the [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fifth Fleet]].<ref name="cswe" /><ref name="inf">''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Following his appearance in ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' in [[2003]], the final novel in [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series, Kre'fey did not appear in any subsequent novels until the publication of ''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'', the sixth installment in the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' series. In the novel's epilogue, a character named Kre'fey holding the rank of admiral is mentioned as having fought in the Battle of Kashyyyk. While the unseen character was not specifically identified as Traest Kre'fey, ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', released in [[2008]], confirmed that the two individuals were one and the same.
